plugin.name: WB Gamification
plugin.description: Complete gamification plugin for BuddyPress and WordPress. Part of the Reign Stack. Points, badges, levels, leaderboards, challenges, and streaks — zero config, works out of the box.
plugin.architecture: Event-sourced, manifest auto-discovery, zero-config. Engine owns three surfaces: event normalization → rule evaluation → output.

endpoints.purpose: Fallback REST endpoint for WP Abilities API (WP 6.9+).
List all registered gamification actions.
Retrieve a single gamification action definition.
List all badge definitions.
Retrieve, update, or delete a badge definition.
Manually award a badge to a user.
Retrieve shareable badge award card (OG-ready).
Retrieve OpenBadges 3.0 verifiable credential.
Discovery endpoint listing capabilities (mobile apps, remote sites).
List challenges.
Create a new challenge (admin only).
Retrieve, update, or delete a challenge.
Mark a challenge as completed by the current user.
Ingest a gamification event from any source (headless, mobile, API, third-party).
Retrieve recent kudos feed.
Give kudos to another member.
Retrieve current user's kudos sent/received counts and daily budget.
Retrieve public leaderboard rankings.
Retrieve leaderboard scoped to a specific BuddyPress group.
Retrieve current user's rank and position on leaderboard.
List all level definitions with progression thresholds.
Retrieve full member profile (points, level, badges, streaks).
Retrieve member's total points and historical point transactions.
Retrieve member's current level and progress toward next level.
Retrieve all badges earned by a member.
Retrieve member's activity log of gamification events.
Retrieve member's current streak data and history.
Retrieve toast notifications for the current user.
Retrieve OpenAPI 3.0.3 specification for the API.
Manually award points to a user (admin only).
Revoke/delete a point transaction (admin only).
Retrieve year-in-community recap data for a member.
List redemption items.
Create a redemption item (admin only).
Retrieve, update, or delete a redemption item.
Redeem points for a redemption item.
Retrieve current user's redemption history.
List or create gamification rules (admin only).
Retrieve, update, or delete a gamification rule (admin only).
List or create webhooks (admin only).
Retrieve, update, or delete a webhook (admin only).
Retrieve or clear webhook delivery log (admin only).
Create level definition (Tier 0.A)
Update / delete level (Tier 0.A)
Read / write cohort league settings (Tier 0.A)
List / create API keys (Tier 0.A — secret returned once on POST)
Revoke (deactivate, keep audit trail) an API key (Tier 0.A)
Permanently delete API key (Tier 0.A)
List / create community (global-counter) challenges (Tier 0.B)
Read / update / cascade-delete community challenge (Tier 0.B)
Create badge with full schema + nested condition rule (Tier 0.C)
Public catalogue of active point types.
Create a new currency.
Update currency metadata.
Delete a non-default currency.
List active conversion rules.
Create a conversion rule.
Update a conversion rule.
Delete a conversion rule.
Atomic member-facing convert: debits source + credits destination, FOR-UPDATE locked, shared event_id.
Admin queue list.
Member submits an achievement.
Approve submission → fires earning event.
Reject submission with optional reason.
Per-event transactional email toggles.
Admin roster - paginated, searchable member list with points/level/badges.
Toggle the per-user earning veto (wb_gam_sandboxed).
Zero a member balance via a balancing debit (audit-preserving).
Bulk award the same points to a role or all members (exclusion-aware).
Export plugin configuration options as a JSON document.
Apply a settings export document to this site.
Rebuild the leaderboard snapshot and clear its caches.
Wipe member progress tables (keeps config); requires explicit confirm.

rest.notes: 39 register_rest_route() calls. Some routes registered as a single call covering multiple methods (e.g., GET+POST on the same path); manifest expands those for clarity. No AJAX layer — all interactive UI talks to REST.

admin_pages.title: Conversions
admin_pages.purpose: Admin-defined exchange rates between currencies; toggleable, with optional cooldown + daily-cap.

admin_pages.title: Point Types
admin_pages.purpose: CRUD for currencies. Marks default. Lists per-type balance aggregates.

admin_pages.title: Submissions
admin_pages.purpose: Approve / reject pending member achievement submissions; approval fires the matching action through the standard earning pipeline.

admin_pages.title: Gamification Setup
admin_pages.purpose: First-run setup wizard, parent slug intentionally null so it does not appear in the menu.

settings.purpose: Tracks DB schema version for DbUpgrader migrations.
Marks setup wizard as completed; gates first-run banners.
Points awarded to the giver per kudos.
Points awarded to the receiver per kudos.
Months to retain pruneable log rows; consumed by LogPruner.
Months to retain raw events; consumed by event-pruning cron.
Automation rules mapping point thresholds → roles.
ID of the auto-created hub page where the [wb_gam_hub] shortcode lives.
Has the tenure seeding migration run for existing users?
Weekly nudge email enable + From address.
Per-feature kill switch (challenges, kudos, streaks, etc.).
Per-action point values used by the rule engine.
Per-webhook delivery log retained for the dashboard.

blocks.name: wb-gamification/hub
blocks.notes: Layout-owning: full-width member hub page. Auto-installed on first activation per `wb_gam_hub_page_id` option.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_events
tables.purpose: Immutable event log (UUID PK, source of truth for all gamification activity).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_points
tables.purpose: Points ledger (derived from events; event_id FK).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_user_badges
tables.purpose: Earned badges per user; supports `expires_at` for time-bound credentials.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_badge_defs
tables.purpose: Badge definitions (name, description, image, criteria).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_rules
tables.purpose: All rule conditions (points, badge, level thresholds).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_levels
tables.purpose: Level definitions (name, threshold, icon).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_challenges
tables.purpose: Individual challenge definitions.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_challenge_log
tables.purpose: Per-user progress on challenges.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_community_challenges
tables.purpose: Group/community challenge definitions.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_community_challenge_contributions
tables.purpose: Per-user contributions to community challenges.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_kudos
tables.purpose: Kudos given/received log.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_member_prefs
tables.purpose: Per-user notification/privacy preferences.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_leaderboard_cache
tables.purpose: Leaderboard snapshot cache (refreshed every 5 min by cron).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_webhooks
tables.purpose: Registered outbound webhook endpoints + delivery state.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_streaks
tables.purpose: Streak state per user (current count, longest, last-activity-on).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_redemptions
tables.purpose: Redemption transactions (points spent → reward delivered).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_redemption_items
tables.purpose: Redemption store catalog.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_cohort_members
tables.purpose: Cohort league membership (assignment + tier).

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_point_types
tables.purpose: Currency catalogue — slug, label, icon, is_default flag, position. Site can define Points/XP/Coins/etc.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_point_type_conversions
tables.purpose: Admin-defined exchange rates between currencies (e.g. 100 points = 1 coin) with optional cooldown + daily cap.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_submissions
tables.purpose: Pending achievement submissions queue. One row per submitted achievement; approval updates status + fires the matching earning event.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_user_totals
tables.purpose: Materialised per-user, per-point-type total. Read by PointsEngine::get_total — avoids SUM() across the points ledger on the hot path. UPSERT pattern in PointsEngine::award + award_batch.

tables.name: {prefix}wb_gam_api_keys
tables.purpose: API key registry. Stores SHA-256 hashes (never plaintext) plus key_prefix + key_suffix for identification. The full key is shown once on creation; thereafter only the prefix and suffix are visible.
tables.introduced: 1.2.0 (admin REST migration; replaced legacy wb_gam_api_keys option)

enforced_at: via Capabilities::user_can in every REST controller's admin_check
capabilities.enforcement_count: primary admin gate; passes alongside any granular cap below
capabilities.note: Default WP admin gate. Every REST controller's permission method accepts manage_options OR the corresponding granular plugin cap below — administrators keep working without reconfiguration; site owners can delegate individual surfaces to non-admin roles by granting the granular cap.

capabilities.registered_at: src/Engine/Capabilities.php (granted on activation + plugins_loaded sync; cleaned up in uninstall.php)
capabilities.note: Manual point award + revoke (REST + admin page). Grant to non-admin roles to delegate point-award rights.
Badge library + rule management + manual badge award (REST + admin page). Same surface as the Badges admin page.
Rule / level / challenge definition management (RulesController). Distinct from badge management — rules govern the broader award + level + challenge surface.
Individual + community challenges + cohort leagues (REST + 3 admin pages).
Redemption store catalog management (REST + admin page).
Outbound webhook configuration + delivery log access (REST only — no dedicated admin page; webhook config goes through the REST API).
Level definition CRUD (LevelsController). Added in 1.5.0 after audit/DATA-FLOW-ADMIN-REST-2026-05-27.md §G1 — controller already gated on this cap but the cap was never registered.
UGC submission queue (SubmissionsController). Added in 1.5.0 — pre-refactor the controller hardcoded `manage_options`, breaking granular delegation.
Transactional email toggles (EmailSettingsController). Added in 1.5.0 — same hardcode pattern as submissions.
Analytics dashboard menu visibility. Granted to administrator on activation; site owners can grant to non-admin staff for read-only access.

services.purpose: Action-Scheduler async event processing.
Rule-based badge evaluation triggered by events.
Public OG-ready badge share URL handler.
Individual challenge progress + completion.
Cohort-based leaderboard leagues.
Group/community challenge progress aggregation.
Cosmetic frames/decorations grant + equip.
Expires badge credentials based on validity_days.
Schema migrations gated by wb_gam_db_version option.
Central event processor. Listeners write events; engine evaluates rules and dispatches outputs.
Value object for normalized events.
Per-feature kill switches read from wb_gam_enabled_* options.
Activation hook — creates all tables + seeds defaults.
Peer kudos with cooldown + daily budget.
Daily/weekly/monthly/all-time leaderboards with scopes; cached via cron.
Weekly nudge email about leaderboard standing.
Computes user level from points totals against level thresholds.
Daily cleanup of old log rows.
Scans integration files for action manifests at plugins_loaded@5.

Shared renderer for the member achievements surface mounted by integration adapters (BuddyPress profile tab, WooCommerce My Account endpoint, opt-in LearnDash link). Owns asset enqueue, member-scoped block rendering, the mapped hub link, and the wrapper. Filter: wb_gam_member_surface_html.
Bridges WP upload_files cap to logged-in members so the achievement editor Add Media button works for subscribers / contributors. Opt-out filter: wb_gam_grant_member_uploads.
Optional-module on/off toggles - suppresses disabled modules blocks/shortcodes and removes their admin pages.
Bridges plugin events to BuddyPress notifications.
Generic nudge dispatcher (re-engagement).
Tracks personal-best metrics.
Append-only points ledger with action-scheduler async processing.
Opt-in daily inactivity point decay (wb_gam_points_decay cron).
GDPR-style export/erase handlers.
Reset all member progress - truncates progress/derived tables, keeps config/definitions.
Auto-assign WordPress roles based on point thresholds.
Per-action daily caps.
Year-in-review recap generator.
Points → reward redemption transactions.
Auto-registers actions discovered by ManifestLoader.
Generic rule evaluation pipeline.
Settings import/export - serialises wb_gam_* config options to JSON and applies one back, excluding runtime/derived/schema state.
Registers all 12 shortcodes.
Awards 'first ever' badges to the first user to perform a tracked action.
Retains/expires status-based rewards.
Daily/weekly streak tracking per user.
Anniversary/tenure badges based on registration date.
Outbound webhook delivery (Zapier/Make/n8n).
Weekly recap email to opted-in users.
SQL repo for wb_gam_point_type_conversions; active-only filter.
SQL repo for wb_gam_point_types with cache wrapper + slug normalisation.
SQL repo for wb_gam_submissions.
Atomic convert flow with FOR-UPDATE locking + shared event_id.
Currency catalogue + canonical resolve($input):slug helper.
Submission lifecycle — submit/approve/reject + rate-limit + approval awards.

hooks_fired.name: wb_gam_engines_booted
hooks_fired.purpose: All engines have been instantiated and wired to plugins_loaded.

hooks_fired.name: wb_gam_event_processed
hooks_fired.purpose: An event has finished evaluating rules + dispatching outputs.

hooks_fired.name: wb_gam_manifests_loaded
hooks_fired.purpose: ManifestLoader has finished scanning action manifests; Registry is populated.

hooks_fired.name: wb_gam_manifest_paths
hooks_fired.purpose: Filter the list of manifest file paths scanned by ManifestLoader. Use to add custom integration manifests.

dead_listeners_notes: Naive paired-grep flagged 2 candidates (wb_gam_leaderboard_snapshot, wb_gam_process_event_async). Both are CRON / Action-Scheduler hooks fired by WP core / Action Scheduler — NOT plugin-fired hooks. False positives. No real dead listeners detected.

dead_listeners_notes.topic: Legacy blocks/ directory disconnected from registration (Phase G.4)
dead_listeners_notes.note: Phase G.4 emptied the legacy register_blocks() list in wb-gamification.php. The blocks/<slug>/ dir now contains 15 dead-code copies that should be deleted in a follow-up. wppqa flags 1 inline-onclick + 3 img-missing-alt in this dir — all false positives against dead code. Active block versions live at src/Blocks/<slug>/.
dead_listeners_notes.resolution: Legacy blocks/ dir (15 dirs, 50 files) deleted via git rm. Active blocks remain at src/Blocks/<slug>/ + build/Blocks/<slug>/.

declared_but_unenforced.note: Referenced as add_submenu_page() capability at src/Admin/AnalyticsDashboard.php:62 but no Capabilities::user_can() guard inside the render path. Site owners can grant this cap but it does nothing without an explicit gate inside render(); admin-menu visibility alone IS the gate today, which is intentional but worth documenting.

orphan_in_uninstall_only.note: Listed in uninstall.php:165 for role-cleanup but neither declared in Capabilities::declared_caps() nor enforced anywhere. ApiKeysPage uses manage_options at src/Admin/ApiKeysPage.php:107.
Listed in uninstall.php:163; RedemptionStorePage actually uses wb_gam_manage_rewards at src/Admin/RedemptionStorePage.php:117. Stale cap name in uninstall cleanup.

cap_drift.manage_options_gate_count: estimated ~30 — most admin pages and Settings-tab guards default to manage_options; granular caps are layered on top via Capabilities::user_can() at handler entry, but the menu-registration capability is manage_options. This pattern is intentional (menu visibility is admin-only; handler-level granularity is delegated).

plugin_check_warnings.action: Gate fails if total grows OR a new code appears (bin/check-plugin-check.sh).

phpcs_ignore_inline.action: Inline phpcs:ignore + phpcs:disable annotations across plugin code. Most are nonce-verified-upstream and direct-DB-query patterns for hot ledger paths. No bulk audit required — annotations are reviewed at PR time.

phpstan_baseline_file.action: no phpstan-baseline.neon present — codebase passes at level 9 without baselining.

phpcs_excludes.action: review .phpcs.xml — only project-scope rules, no per-file excludes

wiring_completeness.note: N/A for this plugin — no /templates/ wiring. Bespoke bin/check-event-wiring.sh provides equivalent gate.

wppqa_baseline_findings.verdict: release-clean on the 3 targeted checks. Omnibus audit_plugin reports 2,428 failed but ~99% are phpcs noise (scanner ignores .phpcs.xml). Real findings tracked via git history of audit/ISSUES-2026-05-27.yaml (closed 2026-05-28).

results.before: AbilitiesRegistration declared [daily, weekly, monthly, all]; controller + engine accept singular [all, day, week, month]. 3rd-party Abilities-API callers using the documented plural would silently fall back to 'all' (no validate_callback enforces the enum at the controller).
results.fix: Aligned AbilitiesRegistration to the canonical singular forms. Documented in code comment.
results.follow_up: Consider adding validate_callback on LeaderboardController::get_scope_args[period] so unknown values return 400 instead of falling through to default. Filed as a hygiene improvement, not a release blocker.

results.explanation: ChallengesController write enum [active, inactive] is the row-state set. CommunityChallengesController GET filter enum [active, inactive, all] is a query-filter set where 'all' = 'don't filter'. Different concerns, same variable name. The 'all' in CommunityChallenges is intentional for read-side filtering and doesn't apply to writes. Linter groups by name; no actual contract drift.

files: src/API/MembersController.php:593 (notification kinds: badge, challenge, kudos, level_up, points, streak_milestone)
results.explanation: Three completely unrelated logical fields all named 'type' in their respective contexts. The wppqa linter groups by the variable/key name 'type' and flags the disagreement, but these never share a code path. False positive.

enum_consistency_findings.verdict: 1 real drift fixed (period); 2 false positives documented. Re-running wppqa_check_enum_consistency will still report all 3 — the linter's grouping heuristic doesn't follow context. Acknowledge and proceed.

Lifecycle.details: linter false positive — register_activation/deactivation_hook + uninstall.php all present and verified

gap_analysis_triage.GAP-001 REST-AUTH (critical): false_positive — 19 routes use __return_true per the documented public allowlist (catalog reads, OG share, OpenBadges credential, leaderboard, OpenAPI spec). bin/coding-rules-check.sh Rule 2 enforces the allowlist and currently passes.
gap_analysis_triage.GAP-004 DB-UNINSTALL (critical): false_positive — uninstall.php exists at plugin root with 4908 bytes (drops all 18 tables, options, transients, cron, AS tasks, user meta).
gap_analysis_triage.GAP-005 DB-ACTIVATION (critical): false_positive — register_activation_hook at wb-gamification.php:363 calls Installer::install() + 8 engine activation methods.
gap_analysis_triage.GAP-006 CRON-DEACTIVATION (critical): false_positive — register_deactivation_hook at wb-gamification.php:381 calls 8 engine deactivation methods + flush_rewrite_rules. 9 wp_clear_scheduled_hook / wp_unschedule_event call sites confirmed across engine classes.
gap_analysis_triage.GAP-002 ADMIN-SETTINGS (important): intentional — plugin uses central FeatureFlags + custom admin REST save handlers (Tier 0.C migration), not WP Settings API. Architectural choice for cross-cutting state vs per-page settings_field rows.
gap_analysis_triage.GAP-007 TEMPLATE-HOOKS (important): partially_resolved — 86 custom hooks fired across blocks + REST + engine; templates/ dir is intentionally thin (most rendering happens via block render.php which IS heavily hookable).
gap_analysis_triage.GAP-008 WIRING-ISSUES (important): contradicted — wppqa_check_rest_js_contract returns passed=2 failed=0. The 'broken AJAX calls / dead handlers / nonce mismatches' rule didn't surface specifics; the more granular contract check is authoritative.

wppqa_audit_plugin_findings.verdict: 0 real issues from the comprehensive audit. All 4 critical + 3 important gaps are false positives or intentional architecture; verified line-by-line. The 63/100 score reflects pattern-matching limits, not actual maturity. Static gates remain failed=0 across all 4 wppqa specific checks.

sub_classes.purpose: Posts gamification events into the BP activity stream.
Adds points/badge filters to the members directory.
Wires BP profile/group hooks to gamification events.
Renders gamification panels on the BP profile screen.

wp_cli.purpose: Award points to a user. Accepts --type=<slug> for multi-currency sites; defaults to primary currency.
Inspect a member status. Lists per-currency balances on multi-currency sites; --type=<slug> filters to one currency.
Health check of cron schedules, DB schema, and engine wiring.

security.rate_limit_middleware: WBGam\Engine\RateLimiter (per-action daily caps; called from event ingestion path)

nonces.name: wb_gam_delete_badge_{id}
nonces.purpose: Delete badge from admin UI (paired with manage_options check on line 521).

nonces.name: wp_rest
nonces.purpose: Standard wp_rest nonce passed to JS via wp_localize_script for cookie-authenticated REST.

coding_rules: Event-sourced architecture: events in → rules evaluate → effects out. No write to derived tables outside engine classes.
Auto-discovery via ManifestLoader at plugins_loaded@5 — drop a manifest file, get a registered action.
REST is the only interactive API surface — no AJAX (admin-ajax.php) layer.
WPCS via mcp__wpcs__* MCP tools, NOT direct phpcs CLI (the CLI ignores .phpcs.xml when run from outside the plugin).

generated.from: wp-plugin-onboard --refresh — v1.4.0 post-release sweep. Ground-truth re-scan against today diff: 99 plugin hooks (53 actions + 46 filters), 23 tables, 19 blocks, 17 shortcodes, 10 distinct cron hooks, 10 WP-CLI commands, 13 admin pages, 10 declared caps, 24 frontend CSS files + 19 frontend JS files. Sub-arrays (.hooks_fired[], .services[], .frontend_assets) carry over from 2026-05-06 by reference; coverage gate documents the gap. v2.2 schema preserved. See audit/wppqa-baseline-2026-05-27/SUMMARY.md and audit/ISSUES-2026-05-27.yaml.

rest.note: 65 method-row entries cover 56 register_rest_route call sites (1 call may register multiple HTTP methods).

actions_fired.note: Manifest .hooks_fired[] holds 43 action entries; ground-truth scan finds 53 unique wb_gam_ do_action sites. +10 new since 2026-05-06: wb_gam_login_bonus_claimed, wb_gam_submission_approved, wb_gam_submission_created, wb_gam_submission_rejected, wb_gam_point_type_converted, wb_gam_as_cleaned, wb_gam_after_save_cohort_settings, wb_gam_cohort_settings_saved, wb_gam_cohort_outcome, wb_gam_credential_expired. Drift > 5% — re-enumeration deferred to next dedicated refresh.

filters_fired.note: Manifest .hooks_fired[] holds 12 filter entries; ground-truth scan finds 46 unique wb_gam_ apply_filters sites. Massive growth from per-block data filters (14 wb_gam_block_*_data filters added in block standard migration). Major drift — re-enumeration deferred.

tables.note: Manifest .tables[] is missing {prefix}wb_gam_api_keys (added in v1.2.0 Tier-0 admin REST migration but not back-filled).

blocks.note: Manifest has 17 block entries; src/Blocks/ contains 19 directories with block.json. Missing: give-kudos, user-status-bar (added in v1.4.0).

shortcodes.note: Manifest has 15; ShortcodeHandler registers 17 add_shortcode call sites. +2 since 2026-05-06: give_kudos, my_rewards.

cron.note: Manifest .cron[] has 9; ground truth = 10 distinct CRON_HOOK constants (wb_gam_weekly_nudge, wb_gam_weekly_email, wb_gam_as_cleanup, wb_gam_prune_logs, wb_gam_status_retention_check, wb_gam_credential_expiry_check, wb_gam_tenure_check, wb_gam_cohort_assign, wb_gam_cohort_process, wb_gam_leaderboard_snapshot). Missing: wb_gam_as_cleanup (ActionSchedulerCleaner, v1.4.0).

capabilities.note: Manifest .capabilities[] has 7; Capabilities::declared_caps() registers 10 (wb_gam_award_manual, wb_gam_manage_badges, wb_gam_manage_rules, wb_gam_manage_challenges, wb_gam_manage_rewards, wb_gam_manage_webhooks, wb_gam_manage_levels, wb_gam_manage_submissions, wb_gam_manage_email_settings, wb_gam_view_analytics). Missing in manifest: wb_gam_manage_rules, wb_gam_manage_levels, wb_gam_manage_submissions, wb_gam_manage_email_settings.

services.note: Manifest .services[] has 43; src/Engine/ + src/Services/ + src/Repository/ collectively expose ~54 class-like services. Newer additions not yet recorded: Transaction, TransactionalEmailEngine, HeartbeatChannel, Templates, LoginBonusEngine, Email, Log, ProfilePage, BlockHooks, ActionSchedulerCleaner, Capabilities (some are utility classes, not all need to be in .services[]).

frontend_css.note: Today CSS architecture refactor (admin.css split into per-page sheets) added 17+ new feature-domain CSS files: tokens.css, utilities.css, components.css, third-party-suppression.css + 13 per-page sheets under assets/css/admin/pages/. Major drift — re-enumeration deferred.

frontend_js.note: Tier-0 admin REST migration added admin-rest-utils.js, admin-rest-form.js, admin-action-overrides.js, admin-cohort.js, admin-api-keys.js, admin-levels.js, admin-submissions.js, admin-test-event.js, admin-reward-type-toggle.js, admin-rule-action-toggle.js, give-kudos.js, heartbeat.js, hub-convert.js, plus 2 interactivity stores (hub.js, notifications.js). Major drift — re-enumeration deferred.

generated.last_pr_merged: v1.5.3 - site-owner controls (exclusion, members roster, bulk award, settings import/export, rebuild-leaderboard)
generated.since_last_refresh: 1.5.3 complete: all 8 site-owner controls. p2 adds Modules toggles (ModuleToggles), point expiry/decay (PointsExpiry, daily cron wb_gam_points_decay), and reset-all-member-progress (ProgressReset + POST tools/reset-progress). +1 REST endpoint, +3 services, +1 cron hook, +1 filter (wb_gam_module_enabled), +2 actions (wb_gam_progress_reset, wb_gam_points_decayed).

wp_cli_commands.purpose: Replay archived events through the engine for migration / reindex paths.
Seed QA test pages with side-by-side block + shortcode rendering for parity verification.
Synthetic 1M-row dataset for scale benchmark gate (composer scale:bench).
Bypass per-event toggle and dry-run a transactional email via the renderer pipeline.
